creator: bob@vesterman.com
text:
Sorry to be a pain, but is there any chance of this being done anytime soon? 

There's a bug (bug #277508) building lang/gnat12 that's been around for at least a couple months, which causes synth to try and fail to build that port every single time (and it takes a long time between "try" and "fail", every single time). I have no particular reason to believe the latest synth would help with it -- this sort of stuff is mostly unfamiliar to me -- but hope springs eternal.

In any case, and probably more important, I imagine that 3.00's SUBPACKAGES support will become more and more  important as time passes?

Thanks, and again I'm sorry to be a pain about this.
